sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check blue circle position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_row = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color=b, bounds=[{min_row},{max_row}]x[{min_col},{max_col}], pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Click blue circle
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 46}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
